# Story: User Profile

As an authenticated user,
I want to view and update my profile,
so that I can manage my account information.

## Acceptance Criteria

### AC-1: View Profile
Given an authenticated user,
When the user requests their profile,
Then the system returns the user's current profile data.

### AC-2: Update Profile
Given valid profile updates,
When the user submits profile changes,
Then the system persists the changes and returns the updated profile.
